legend.verification: Each feature has an executable verification command. State advances to 'passing' ONLY when verification succeeds.

features.behavior: Game loads, shows hub screen with currencies, alignment meter, heat meter, season record, and battle card
Bottom nav switches between hub, squad, cards, league, auction screens without JS errors
features.verification: npx playwright test tests/comprehensive.spec.js --grep 'Navigation' && npx playwright test tests/p15-visual.spec.js --grep 'No JS Errors'
features.evidence: commit bba8848 — nav + error-free tests pass

features.behavior: Save/load via localStorage (cu_save_v3): persists across reload, handles corrupt data gracefully, fresh start on empty storage
IPL-style auction: start auction, cards presented one-by-one, bid increases price, pass skips to next card, won players join squad
Full match sim: squad select -> prematch (strategy, pitch, opponent) -> ball-by-ball sim -> result with valid non-zero scores -> season record update
features.evidence: commit bba8848 — 4 match engine tests pass

features.behavior: Squad selection overlay: shows players, auto-select, confirm navigates to prematch, overseas cap enforced (max 4)
features.evidence: commit bba8848 — 4 squad selection tests pass

features.behavior: Pre-match screen: shows opponent info, pitch type, strategy toggle, fix banner when mafia bonus active
Match interactivity: bowler picker with field placement (attacking/defensive/standard modifiers on calcBallOutcome), tactical boost (6 balls), tactic buttons
features.verification: npx playwright test tests/comprehensive.spec.js --grep 'Match Interactivity' && npx playwright test tests/smoke.spec.js --grep 'bowler|field'
features.evidence: commit bba8848 — field placement + boost + bowler tests pass

features.behavior: DRS challenges, Impact Player substitution, weather effects, super over tiebreaker, injury system
features.evidence: commit 33fbd36 — systems #35-39 implemented, code review passed

features.behavior: Cards screen shows squad, filter by role, standard pack (500 coins), premium pack (15 gems), 3D card flip animation
features.verification: npx playwright test tests/comprehensive.spec.js --grep 'Cards' && npx playwright test tests/smoke.spec.js --grep 'pack'

features.behavior: Squad screen: shows all members with stats, player detail overlay, training (costs coins, increases stat), release player (refunds coins, reduces squad)
League table with 10 teams, player team highlighted, promotion zone for top 2, season end triggers at match 15
Market overlay from hub: buy tab shows listings, sell tab shows squad players
5-zone alignment (-100 to +100), inertia at extremes, zone-specific theming, sponsor tier matching, clean streak tracking
Mafia banner in grey/corrupt zones, hidden for clean players, blocked during investigation, declining increases alignment
Debt escalation (stage increase, 20% interest), pay debt deducts black money, fails without funds
Investigation starts at high heat (5 match countdown), tribunal resolves with evidence-weighted verdict (7 possible outcomes)
Pep talk boosts morale (costs coins), media bribe reduces heat (costs coins), both fail without funds
Tutorial shows for new game, skippable via button
Settings overlay with team name input, saves on confirm
Procedural team crests (SVG), power ring, battle card, player silhouettes, spring physics, animated gradient backgrounds per screen, glass panels with elevation
Match with 3-player squad, max/min heat, max/min alignment, zero coins — no crashes
features.evidence: commit bba8848 — 5 edge case tests pass

features.behavior: 50 unique Indianized players with role-appropriate stats, rarity distribution, overseas flags
features.verification: manual — verify in-game auction/pack pools show diverse players
features.evidence: commit bba8848 — expanded from 20 to 50 players

features.behavior: Commentary system with richer contextual commentary and social media reactions
features.verification: manual — play match and observe commentary panel
features.evidence: commit bba8848 — richer commentary + social media
